org.apache.paimon.annotation

Annotation Type Documentation.Immutable


  • @Target(value=FIELD)
 @Retention(value=RUNTIME)
public static @interface Documentation.Immutable
    Annotation used on ConfigOption fields to exclude it from schema change.
